subcodes.title: Words to Mary Hanford Ford et al around 1911-10-25
subcodes.first_line: I am very unhappy to see how wicked and uncivilized human beings can be... See what a slight thing will shut off our physical sight, so will a slight indiscretion, a cross word, an adverse criticism shut off the delicate spiritual sight.
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @war and peace, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
